verses.text: Tua ciangin siampi lianpenpa Eliashib leh a siampipihte in nasep kipanin Tuu Kongpi a bawl uh hi. Amaute in a khuamte leh a zawlte bawlin a kongkhakte bulh uh hi. Amaute in Za Khat Tausang ciang banah Hananel Tausang dong sem uh a, tua ciangin Pasian' tungah ap uh hi
A zomah Jerikho khua mite in sem uh hi. Amaute' zomah Imri' tapa Zakkur in sem hi
Tua ciangin Hassenaah' tapate in Ngasa Kongpi bawl uh hi. Amaute in a zawlte khungin a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh hi
Amaute' zomah Hakkoz' tapa Uriah, a tapa Meremoth in ama khawk sung puah hi. Tua zomah Meshezabel' tapa Berekhiah, a tapa Meshullam hi a, tua zomah Baana' tapa Zadok in puah hi
A zom kikah Tekoa khua mite in puah uh a, ahi zongin amau' uliante in a tote uh sawl bangin sem nuamlo uh hi
Tua ciangin Paseah' tapa Joiada leh Besodeiah' tapa Meshullam in Jeshanah Kongpi puah uh a, a zawlte khungin a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh hi
Amaute' zomah Gibeon leh Mizpah khuami ahi, Gibeon mi Melatiah leh Meronoth khuami Jadon in Eufratis Gungal gam a uksawnpa' zum dong puah uh hi
Tua zomah khamseekpa Harhaiah' tapa Uzziel in puah a, a zomah paknamtui bawlpa Hananiah in puah hi. Amaute in Kulh Zai ciangdong a ngeina bangin Jerusalem bawlkik uh hi
Amaute' zomah Jerusalem gam phelkhat a uk, Hur' tapa Refaiah in puah hi
A zomah Harumaf' tapa Jedaiah in ama inn mai san teng puah hi. Tua ciangin a zomah Hashabneiah' tapa Hattush in puah hi
Harim' tapa Malkhijah leh Pahathmoab' tapa Hasshub in Meikhuk Tausang a huam khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi
Amaute' zomah Jerusalem gam a phelkhat a uk, Hallohesh' tapa Shallum in a tanute tawh a puah uh hi
Hanun leh Zanoah khua-a teng mite in Kuam Kongpi puah uh hi. Amaute in tua kongpi bawlpha-in a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh a, Nin Kongpi ciangdong pi tul leh pi za nga sung kulh a puah uh hi
Bethhakkherem gam a uk, Rekhab' tapa Malkhijah in Nin Kongpi puah a, tua kongpi bawlpha-in a kongkhakte a kalhna a bulh hi

Mizpah gam a uk, Kolhozeh' tapa Shallum in Tuinak Kongpi puah a, tua kongpi bawlpha-in a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh hi. Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa' huan gei-a kulh ciang a, David khuapi pana hong paisuk kahlei ciangdong a sem hi
Ama zomah Bethzur gam phelkhat a uk, Azbuk' tapa Nehemiah in David' han san ciang, a kibawl tawm bual leh Galkap Inn ciangdong puah hi
Ama zomah a puah Levi mite: Bani' tapa Rehum hi a, ama zomah Keilah gam phelkhat a uk Hashabiah in ama gam tangin puah hi
Ama zomah a puah a behte: Keilah gam phelkhat a uk, Henadad' tapa Bavvai in puah hi
A zomah Mizpah gam a uk, Jeshua' tapa Ezer in a Kiu-a galvan koihna kahtohna san khawk khat puah hi
Ama zomah Zabbai' tapa Baruk in a Kiu panin siampi lianpenpa Eliashib' inn kongkhak ciangdong khawk khat sung puah hi
Ama zomah Hakkoz' tapa Uriah, a tapa Meremoth in Eliashib' inn kongkhak panin Eliashib' innmong ciangdong khawk khat sung puah hi
Ama zomah Jerusalem kiimnai-a om siampite in puah uh hi
A zomah Benjamin leh Hasshub in amau' inn mai san puah uh hi. A zomah Ananiah' tapa Maaseiah, a tapa Azariah in ama inn gei san teng puah hi
Ama zomah Henadad' tapa Binnui in Azariah' inn panin a Kiu
leh kulh kiu ciang khawk khat sung puah hi. Uzai' tapa Palal in a Kiu gal san teng leh kumpipa' inn panin hong dawkkhia, zumcingte' omna ahi tausang tungnung teng puah hi
Ama zomah Parosh' tapa Pedaiah in nisuahna lam manawhin Tui Kongpi gal san ciang leh tausang dawk puah hi
Ama zomah Tekoa khuamite in a lian tausang dawk panin Ofel mualbo kulh ciang, khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi
Sakol Kongpi tung san teng ahih leh siampite in amau' inn mai san ciat puah uh hi
Amaute' zomah Immer' tapa Zadok in ama inn mai san puah hi. Ama zomah Nisuahna Kongpi a cing, Shekaniah' tapa Shemaiah in puah hi
Ama zomah Shemaiah' tapa Hananiah leh Zalaf' tapa gukna Hanun in khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi. Amau zomah Berekhiah' tapa Meshullam in ama inndei mai san teng puah hi
Ama zomah khamseekpa Malkhijah in Kikaihkhopna Kongpi mai sana om biakinn nasemte' inn leh sumbukte' inn ciang, leh a kiu-a inndei tungnung ciangdong puah hi
Tua ciangin khamseekte leh sumbukte in a kiu-a inndei tungnung leh Tuu Kongpi kikal a puah uh hi.
